title: Pycnandra litseiflora
taxonomy: Pycnandra litseiflora is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It belongs to the genus Pycnandra, which is a group of plants native to the Pacific Islands. The species Pycnandra litseiflora is a tree species that is endemic to the island of New Caledonia. The classification of Pycnandra litseiflora is further detailed into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.
